assertions.assertion: Configures both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers
assertions.rationale: Code configures both AddJwtBearer("Bearer", ...) and AddOAuth2Introspection("Introspection", ...)

assertions.assertion: Uses ForwardReferenceToken (via Selector.ForwardReferenceToken) to route reference tokens to the introspection handler
assertions.rationale: Response uses a custom ForwardDefaultSelector lambda instead of the Duende Selector.ForwardReferenceToken helper. The assertion specifically requires Selector.ForwardReferenceToken.

assertions.assertion: The scheme name passed to ForwardReferenceToken matches the scheme name used in AddOAuth2Introspection
assertions.rationale: ForwardReferenceToken is not used at all; a custom lambda is used instead

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler
assertions.rationale: Neither code sample sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include at+jwt
The response does not mention the Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer package at all
